kill_fact: No kill found. Every load-bearing fact survives independent primary-source verification. The BBP-418 PDUFA is genuinely LIVE, hard-dated 2026-11-27, Priority Review granted, NO advisory committee planned (FDA-confirmed), and sits on a POSITIVE Phase 3 FORTIFY readout (met all primary + key secondary endpoints, p<0.0001) -- so the ~0.85 win_prob is an approval-given-positive-data gate, not a pre-data coin-flip. The catalyst has NOT fired and the spread has NOT closed: spot ~$66.50 (June 19, 2026) vs analyst-target cluster ~$95-106, still a ~30-55% discount with 5+ months to the event. The floor is REAL and franchise-backed, not a cash-shell or deal-break number: $940.2M cash/marketable securities (Q1 2026, 3/31), an APPROVED and fast-ramping acoramidis/Attruby ATTR-CM franchise ($194.5M Q1 rev / $180.6M US Attruby), guided to breakeven late-2026/2027, with a live $500M buyback as a mechanical bid. The one genuine residual risk -- a CRL/CMC extension despite positive data -- is already the bear case the candidate prices to ~$58, and is bounded by the cash+franchise floor, not a wipeout. The negative-shareholders'-equity / royalty-convertible structure is a real flag but is covenant/flexibility risk, not a going-concern or ATM-into-the-event disqualifier, given $940M cash and a profit inflection. Asymmetry survives intact.
corrections: One label correction (already self-flagged in the candidate dossier, restated here for the record): the load-bearing event is BBP-418 (LGMD2I/R9), NOT acoramidis -- acoramidis/Attruby is already approved and is the revenue engine + floor, not a pending decision. Minor: live price is ~$66.50 (June 19, 2026 close) vs the candidate's $66.80 snapshot -- immaterial to the asymmetry. The FORTIFY readout date is 2025-10-27.
evidence: BridgeBio press release, 2026-05-27 (GlobeNewswire): 'BridgeBio Announces FDA Acceptance and Priority Review of NDA for BBP-418 for LGMD2I/R9' -- Priority Review granted, PDUFA target action date November 27, 2026, FDA not currently planning an advisory committee meeting. https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/27/3301817/0/en/bridgebio-announces-fda-acceptance-and-priority-review-of-nda-for-bbp-418-for-lgmd2i-r9.html

BridgeBio press release, 2025-10-27 (GlobeNewswire/IR): 'BridgeBio Reports Positive Phase 3 Results for Small Molecule BBP-418 in LGMD2I/R9 FORTIFY Study' -- met primary (glycosylated alphaDG +1.8x, p<0.0001) and secondary endpoints, 82% CK reduction, clinically meaningful motor/pulmonary improvement, favorable safety. https://investor.bridgebio.com/news/news-details/2025/BridgeBio-Reports-Positive-Phase-3-Results-for-Small-Molecule-BBP-418-in-LGMD2IR9-FORTIFY-Study/default.aspx

BridgeBio Q1 2026 financial results (reported 2026-05-08): cash, cash equivalents & marketable securities $940.2M as of 2026-03-31; Q1 revenue $194.5M ($180.6M US Attruby net product revenue); $500M share repurchase authorized; guidance to operating breakeven late-2026/2027. https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/05/08/bridgebio-bbio-q1-2026-earnings-transcript/
Market quote: BBIO trading ~$66.50 on 2026-06-19 (52-wk range $39.63-$84.94, mkt cap ~$13B) -- spread to ~$95-106 analyst cluster open, catalyst not yet fired. https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/BBIO/
